title: Location
text:
VENUE

Chäsalp / Alter Tobelhof
Tobelhofstrasse 236
8044 Zürich, Switzerland
www.chaesalp.ch


How to Get There
Check the SBB Journey Planner.
Public Transport - Option I

Take Tram 6 (direction Zoo) to Kirche Fluntern (ca. 10 min. from Zürich HB)
Transfer to Bus 751 (direction Stettbach Bahnhof), get off at Zürich, Tobelhof (ca. 10 min. from Kirche Fluntern)
Walk approximately 2 minutes uphill to Chäsalp/ Restauran Alter Tobelhof

Public Transport - Option II

Take S-Train S3, S7, S9, S11, S12 to Stettbach (ca. 8 min. from Zürich HB)
Transfer to Bus 751 (direction Kirche Fluntern), get off at Zürich, Tobelhof (ca. 10 min. from Stettbach)
Walk approximately 2 minutes uphill to Chäsalp/ Restauran Alter Tobelhof

Journey time from Zürich HB: 25-30 minutes.

Car
Address for GPS: Tobelhofstrasse 236, 8044 Zürich
Free parking available at the venue.
Journey time from Zürich city center: 15 minutes.



Map

title: FAQ
text:
FAQs - Frequently Asked Questions
We’ve compiled answers to some common questions. If you don’t find what you’re looking for, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us directly!
Jump to a topic:

title: FAQ
text:
When and Where?



When is the party?
Saturday, 29th of August, 2026, 4pm onwards.
For anyone who would like to arrive a day early and enjoy some time together before the main event, we will be meeting at the Grain Pub in Zurich (Kirche Fluntern) on Friday evening - 28th of August, for some drinks and snacks from 6pm onwards. Please let us know via the RSVP whether you would like to join.
Where is the party?
The main event will be held at Chäsalp, Tobelhofstrasse 236, 8044 Zürich. Find the detailed directions under location.

title: FAQ
text:
RSVP & Guest Information



When do I need to RSVP by?
Please RSVP latest by 1st of July, 2026. This helps us finalize catering numbers and further planning.
Can I bring a plus-one?
We’ve carefully curated our guest list based on venue capacity. If your invitation includes “and guest” or names a specific person, they are warmly welcomed. If you’re unsure, please contact us!
Are children welcome?
We love your little ones, but we’ve decided to make our wedding an adults-only celebration.
What if I have dietary restrictions?
Please indicate any dietary restrictions, allergies, or special meal requirements in your RSVP form. The caterers from Chäsalp will do their best to accommodate your needs.

title: FAQ
text:
Event Details



Friday, 28th August 2026
Welcome Drinks @Grain Pub.
For anyone who would like to arrive a day early and enjoy some time together before the main event, we will be meeting at the Grain Pub in Zurich (Kirche Fluntern) on Friday evening for some drinks and snacks from 6pm onwards. Please let us know via the RSVP whether you would like to join.

Staturday, 29th August 2026
Main Event @Chäsalp. See location.
Apéro: 4pm - 7pm
Dinner: 7pm - 10pm
Dancing: 10pm - open end

title: FAQ
text:
Transportation & Parking



How do I get to the venue?
Detailed directions by public transport and car you find under location.
Is there parking available?
Yes! Chäsalp offers free off-street parking.
Will there be transportation provided?
[Option 1: We will not be providing shuttle service, but taxis and Uber are readily available in the area.]
[Option 2: We will be arranging shuttle service from [location] to the venue. More details will be shared closer to the date.]

title: FAQ
text:
Dress Code & Weather



What should I wear?
Whatever makes you feel “happy and pretty and gaaay”!
What’s the weather like in Zurich at end of August?
End of August in Zürich typically has [average temperature] temperatures. We recommend bringing:


A light jacket or wrap for the evening
Comfortable shoes (there may be some walking (optionally running) on uneven surfaces)
An umbrella just in case

The venue has both indoor and outdoor spaces, so we’ll be comfortable regardless of weather!

title: FAQ
text:
Gifts



Can I bring gifts?
Having you celebrate with us is what matters most to us — no gifts expected.  For those who would still like to contribute, there will be two optional options at the celebration: a donation to a charitable organization (tbd) and/or a contribution towards our new bed.

title: FAQ
text:
Accommodation



Where should we stay?
If you don’t have a place to stay yet, please get in touch with Nadja and/or Dalia.

title: FAQ
text:
Contact & Other Questions



I have mobility concerns. Is the venue accessible?
Please contact Nadja or Dalia to discuss your specific needs.
I’m traveling from abroad. What do I need to know?

….

title: RSVP
text:

Each guest is kindly asked to register individually, including couples, as we require individual information for the event planning.
